uploadDescription: Upload one SVG file to convert it into PNG, JPEG, or WebP.
chooseSvgLabel: Drag and drop an SVG here, or click to upload
uploadHint: The tool reads the original SVG dimensions automatically.
optionsDescription: Adjust output format, dimensions, background, and quality before converting.
keepAspectDescription: Resize the SVG while preserving its original proportions.
backgroundFillDescription: JPEG always uses the selected background color. PNG and WebP can keep transparency.
qualityDescription: Quality only affects JPEG and WebP exports.
resultDescription: Review the converted image and download the exported file.
emptyResultDescription: Upload an SVG and convert it to preview the raster result.
onlyOneFileError: Only one SVG can be processed at a time.
readError: Failed to read the SVG file.
imageLoadFailedError: Unable to load the SVG image for conversion.
noCanvasError: Canvas is not available in this browser.
